config.message: Checking the LA28 waiting room and keeping the queue session active.
LA28 account generator reached an authenticated profile instead of the login page. Start with a fresh browser session.
Waiting room cleared. Opening the LA28 account registration form.
Registration submitted. Waiting for the email verification screen.
The verification screen did not appear. Retrying the registration submit once.
Verification screen ready. Waiting for the LA28 email code.
Registration reached the LA28 profile directly. Saving the account.
LA28 registration did not expose an email verification form after submit.
